summary: ClearTokens() now also zeroes Config.GraphQLToken and Config.Headers.
reason: Greptile P1/security: logout cleared every other credential but left the AppSync GraphQL JWT persisted in the on-disk TOML, so it survived `auth logout` and silently re-authenticated GraphQL rating mutations. The custom Headers map (applied verbatim to every request, can carry an Authorization header) was also never cleared; the sweep added it for a complete logout.
validated_outcome: After `auth logout`, graphql_token is absent from the config TOML (omitempty + empty); Headers cleared to nil.
